prompt: /ulw build a decision-ready scenario model from these inputs and make a defensible recommendation under uncertainty

hard_checks.description: Formula outputs recalculate to the expected fixture values without hard-coded result cells.
All source inputs, units, dates, and missing-value treatments remain traceable and correct.
Base, upside, downside, and sensitivity logic obey the supplied constraints and identities.

rubric.audience: An operating leader choosing a course of action from uncertain financial and operational inputs.
constraints: Preserve source units and time bases.
Make assumptions editable and visibly separate from observations.
non_goals: Optimize presentation at the expense of auditability
task_specific_anchors: A decision-maker can trace recommendation, threshold, driver, formula, and source without reverse engineering the workbook.
Sensitivity and scenario structure expose where the decision changes, not just a range of outputs.
The model becomes a living decision instrument rather than a one-off calculation.
